window.title: Homepage++
window.description: This plugin overwrites your **new tab** page. Just open a new tab and see the magic.
language.name: English (United Kingdom)
demo.install.title: Install extension
settings.translations.title: Translations
settings.translations.desc: Coverage of each language compared to English (United Kingdom). Missing keys fall back to English. Want to contribute? Visit the {url:i18n} on GitHub.
settings.general.title: General
settings.general.language.title: Language
settings.general.language.desc: Override the display language of the extension
settings.general.show_time.title: Show time
settings.general.show_date.title: Show date
settings.general.searchbar.title: Show search bar
settings.general.show_settings.title: Show settings button
settings.general.animations.title: Enable animations
settings.timestamp.title: Timestamp
settings.timestamp.desc: Configure how the clock and date are displayed, including style and appearance.
settings.timestamp.clock_style.title: Clock style
settings.timestamp.clock_style.desc: Choose how the clock displays and animates
settings.timestamp.clock_tumbler.title: Tumbler effect
settings.timestamp.clock_tumbler.desc: Animate digit changes with a rolling effect (applies to Digital, Unix and Hex)
settings.timestamp.time_12h.title: 12-hour clock
settings.timestamp.time_format.title: Time format
settings.timestamp.time_format.desc: Customise the time format using Python strftime syntax. Leave empty to use the default (`{time.format.default}`).
settings.timestamp.date_format.title: Date format
settings.timestamp.date_format.desc: Customise the date format using Python strftime syntax. Leave empty to use the default (`{date.format.default}`).
settings.timestamp.format_ref.pct_Y: Year with century as a decimal number (e.g., 2025).
settings.timestamp.format_ref.pct_y: Year without century as a zero-padded decimal number (00-99).
settings.timestamp.format_ref.pct_m: Month as a zero-padded decimal number (01-12).
settings.timestamp.format_ref.pct_d: Day of the month as a zero-padded decimal number (01-31).
settings.timestamp.format_ref.pct_e: Day of the month as a space-padded decimal number ( 1-31).
settings.timestamp.format_ref.pct_j: Day of the year as a zero-padded decimal number (001-366).
settings.timestamp.format_ref.pct_w: Weekday as a decimal number, where Sunday is 0.
settings.timestamp.format_ref.pct_H: Hour (24-hour clock) as a zero-padded decimal number (00-23).
settings.timestamp.format_ref.pct_I: Hour (12-hour clock) as a zero-padded decimal number (01-12).
settings.timestamp.format_ref.pct_p: Locale's equivalent of AM or PM.
settings.timestamp.format_ref.pct_M: Minute as a zero-padded decimal number (00-59).
settings.timestamp.format_ref.pct_S: Second as a zero-padded decimal number (00-59).
settings.timestamp.format_ref.pct_f: Millisecond as a zero-padded decimal number (000-999).
settings.timestamp.format_ref.pct_Z: Time zone name (e.g., CET, UTC, PST). Falls back to offset if not available.
settings.background.title: Custom Background
settings.background.url.title: Background URL
settings.background.desc:
Upload images to use as background. Supported formats: JPG, PNG, GIF.
Click a preview to remove it.
settings.background.blur.subtitle: Blur
settings.background.blur_amount_ui.title: Panel blur
settings.background.blur_amount_ui.desc: Blur strength for frosted glass panels (search bar, bookmarks, notepad, weather, etc.)
settings.background.blur_amount_bg.title: Background image blur
settings.background.blur_amount_bg.desc: Blur strength applied to the background image
settings.colours.title: Colours
settings.colours.desc: Customise the colours of various elements on the homepage
settings.colours.global_colour.title: Global text/icon colour
settings.colours.global_colour.desc: Overrides all text colours on the homepage
settings.colours.panel_colour.title: Panel background colour
settings.colours.panel_colour.desc: Colour of frosted glass backgrounds on panels and overlays. Not affected by global colour.
settings.colours.icon_colour.title: Icon colour
settings.colours.icon_colour.desc: Overrides the settings cog, search icon and notepad icons
settings.colours.time_colour.title: Time colour
settings.colours.time_colour.desc: Overrides global colour for the clock
settings.colours.date_colour.title: Date colour
settings.colours.date_colour.desc: Overrides global colour for the date
settings.colours.weather_colour.title: Weather colour
settings.colours.weather_colour.desc: Overrides global colour for the weather widget
settings.colours.bookmarks_colour.title: Bookmarks colour
settings.colours.bookmarks_colour.desc: Overrides global colour for bookmark titles
settings.colours.placeholder_colour.desc: Overrides global colour for placeholder text in all input fields and text areas
settings.colours.input_colour.title: Written text
settings.colours.input_colour.desc: Overrides global colour for typed text in all input fields and text areas
settings.font.title: Custom Font
settings.font.desc: Use any font installed on your local machine (case sensitive), or any font from {url:google_fonts}, which requires both Internet access and the Google Fonts option enabled.
settings.font.font_name.title: Font name
settings.font.google_fonts.title: From Google Fonts
settings.font.google_fonts.desc: Requires internet access to load the font
settings.hexbg.title: 24h HEX Background
settings.hexbg.desc:
The background colour shifts throughout the day based on the current time in HEX format.
Enabling this will disable the Custom Background.
settings.hexbg.enable.title: Enable HEX background
settings.scale.title: Scale
settings.scale.desc: Scale the main elements of the homepage individually, or use the global scale to change everything at once.
settings.scale.global.title: Global scale
settings.scale.global.desc: Scales all elements at once. Individual overrides below take priority. (default: `{default}`)
settings.scale.clock.title: Clock
settings.scale.clock.desc: Overrides global scale for the clock (default: `{default}`)
settings.scale.date.title: Date
settings.scale.date.desc: Overrides global scale for the date (default: `{default}`)
settings.scale.searchbar.title: Search bar
settings.scale.searchbar.desc: Overrides global scale for the search bar (default: `{default}`)
settings.scale.weather.title: Weather
settings.scale.weather.desc: Overrides global scale for the weather widget (default: `{default}`)
settings.scale.bookmarks.title: Bookmarks
settings.scale.bookmarks.desc: Overrides global scale for the bookmarks (default: `{default}`)
settings.scale.icon.title: Icons
settings.scale.icon.desc: Overrides global scale for the notepad and settings icons (default: `{default}`)
settings.accessibility.title: Accessibility
settings.accessibility.desc: Customise the accessibility options for the extension
settings.weather.title: Weather
settings.weather.enable.title: Show weather
settings.weather.hourly.title: Show hourly forecast
settings.weather.daily_days.title: Days of daily forecast
settings.weather.temp_unit.title: Temperature unit
settings.weather.manual_location.title: Pick location manually
settings.weather.manual_location.desc: Click the map to set your coordinates
settings.bookmarks.title: Bookmarks
settings.bookmarks.desc: Add, remove and reorder your bookmarks shown on the homepage.
settings.bookmarks.favicon.title: Show favicons
settings.bookmarks.favicon.desc: Display the site favicon next to each bookmark
settings.bookmarks.top_sites.subtitle: Top Sites
settings.bookmarks.top_sites.section_des: Fetch your most visited sites from browser history as additional bookmarks.
settings.bookmarks.top_sites.title: Enable Top Sites
settings.bookmarks.top_sites.amount.titl: Number of top sites to show
settings.notepad.title: Notepad
settings.notepad.desc: A persistent notepad available on the homepage.
settings.notepad.enable.title: Show notepad
settings.notepad.enable.desc: Toggle the notepad on the homepage
settings.notepad.popup.title: Open as window
settings.notepad.popup.desc: Clicking the notepad icon on the homepage opens a separate window instead of expanding inline
settings.notepad.font_size.title: Font size
settings.notepad.font.title: Notepad font
settings.customcss.title: Custom CSS
settings.customcss.desc: Go wild, make the homepage more personal. You can do whatever you desire.
settings.backup.title: Backup
settings.backup.desc: Back up your settings or restore them from a file.
settings.backup.export.title: Export settings
settings.backup.export.desc: Download all settings as a JSON file
settings.backup.import.title: Import settings
settings.backup.import.desc: Restore settings from a JSON file
